HONORABLE WILLIAM LYNN FINDS: THAT THE DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT IS NOT LEGALLY AUTHORIZED TO CONDUCT A PROFESSIONAL PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY IN THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA.
